rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes
Use implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Write output dependency guarantees using visible inputs and outputs, not implementation-only subcomponent paths
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes to maintain architectural integrity
Use case-provided bounds, constants, or visible relations for concrete assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic and implications
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not use implementation-only paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
